# CVSS Skills

> Professional CVSS v3.0 / v3.1 toolkit — parse, score, validate, compare & build vulnerability vectors.

CVSS Skills is a single, well-tested Go toolkit for the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) v3.0 / v3.1. It is delivered through 4 integration methods: Claude Code Skills, Go SDK, CLI, and MCP.

## Install

Skills (Claude Code):
```
claude mcp add --scope user cvss-skills -- https://github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills
```

Go SDK:
```
go get github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills@latest
```

CLI (pre-built binary, auto-detects OS/arch):
```
curl -sL https://github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills/releases/latest/download/cvss-skills_$(uname -s | tr A-Z a-z)_$(uname -m).tar.gz | tar xz
sudo mv cvss /usr/local/bin/
```

CLI (go install):
```
go install github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills/cmd/cvss-cli@latest
```

## CLI surface

30+ commands: score, parse, validate, build, describe, diff, merge, distance, analyze, range, preset, random, json, csv, batch, severity, sort, canonicalize, convert, enumerate, equal, get, groups, map, modify, strip, subs. All accept `--format json`.

## Pre-built binaries

30+ packages (6 OS, multi-arch) per release. URL template:
```
https://github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills/releases/latest/download/cvss-skills_<os>_<arch>.<ext>
```
OSes: linux, darwin, windows, freebsd, netbsd, openbsd. See README "Pre-built Binaries" for the full arch matrix.

## Repository facts

- Module: github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills
- Language: Go (>= 1.18)
- License: MIT
- CLI binary: cvss (entry: cmd/cvss-cli/)
- CI: GitHub Actions (.github/workflows/ci.yml)
- Release: GoReleaser (.goreleaser.yml) on tag push

## Links

- Website: https://scagogogo.github.io/cvss-skills/
- API Docs: https://scagogogo.github.io/cvss-skills/docs/api/
- Downloads: https://scagogogo.github.io/cvss-skills/downloads/
- GitHub: https://github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills
- Releases: https://github.com/scagogogo/cvss-skills/releases/latest
- CVSS v3.1 spec: https://www.first.org/cvss/v3.1/specification-document
- CVSS v3.0 spec: https://www.first.org/cvss/v3.0/specification-document
